title: PG's Easy Mending
description: Allows the Mending enchantment to appear naturally in the enchanting table like other enchantments.
body:
This datapack makes it easier to obtain the Mending enchantment by allowing it to appear in the enchanting table.

No need for villagers or rare loot anymore — simply enchant your gear and have a chance to get Mending naturally, just like other enchantments.
A small change for a smoother survival experience while keeping the vanilla feel intact!
